problem_text_cn:
## 五、(20分)

惯性系S，S′间相对运动关系如图所示，O，O′重合时$t=t'=0$。$t'=0$时刻开始，质点Q从$x'=L$以匀速度$u$在S′系中沿$x'$轴运动；质点P从$x'=0$以初速为零、匀加速度为$a_0$在S′系中沿$x'$轴运动，直到P，Q相碰为止。设$L=u^2/2a_0$，$v=u$，即已知量仅为$a_0$和$u$。

(1) 在S′系中确定P，Q相碰时刻$t'$；
(2) 在S系中计算从$t=0$时刻P开始加速运动，直到P与Q相碰为止的全过程中，质点P的平均加速度$\bar{a}$；
(3) 在已设$L=u^2/2a_0$，$v=u$前提下，增设$u=(\sqrt{2}-1)c$，计算(2)问中的$\bar{a}$。
problem_solution_cn:
## 五、(20分)

(1) S′系中，P初态$\{x'=0,\;t'=0\}$，P末态$\{x',t'\}$需确定。
$$ \frac{1}{2}a_0 t'^{2}=x'=L+ut',\;\Rightarrow\;a_0 t'^{2}-2ut'-2L=0, $$
$$ \Rightarrow\;t'=\frac{1}{2a_0}\left(2u\pm\sqrt{4u^{2}+8a_0 L}\right)\Big|_{L=u^{2}/2a_0}=\frac{1}{2a_0}\left(2u\pm2\sqrt{2}u\right). $$
取解为
$$ t'=(1+\sqrt{2})u/a_0.\qquad(6\text{分}) $$

(2) S′系中P末态位置和速度分别为
$$ x'=L+ut'=\frac{u^{2}}{2a_0}+\frac{(1+\sqrt{2})u^{2}}{a_0}=\frac{(1+\sqrt{2})^{2}}{2a_0}u^{2},\quad u_x'=a_0 t'=(1+\sqrt{2})u. $$
S系中，P初态$\{x_0=0,\;t_0=0\}$，P末态$\{x,\;t\}$中的$t$需确定。
$$ t=\frac{t'+\frac{v}{c^{2}}x'}{\sqrt{1-\beta^{2}}}\Bigg|_{\beta=\frac{v}{c}=\frac{u}{c}}=\frac{1}{\sqrt{1-\beta^{2}}}\frac{(1+\sqrt{2})u}{a_0}\left[1+\frac{u^{2}}{2c^{2}}(1+\sqrt{2})\right]\Bigg|_{\beta=\frac{u}{c}}, $$
P的末速度
$$ u_x=\frac{u_x'+v}{1+\frac{v}{c^{2}}u_x'}=\frac{(1+\sqrt{2})u+v}{1+\frac{v}{c^{2}}(1+\sqrt{2})u}. $$
全过程中速度增量
$$ \Delta u=u_x-v=\frac{(1+\sqrt{2})u+v-v-\frac{v^{2}}{c^{2}}(1+\sqrt{2})u}{1+\frac{v}{c^{2}}(1+\sqrt{2})u}=\left(1-\frac{u^{2}}{c^{2}}\right)(1+\sqrt{2})u\Big/\left[1+\frac{u^{2}}{c^{2}}(1+\sqrt{2})\right]. $$
全过程平均加速度
$$ \bar{a}=\frac{\Delta u}{\Delta t}=\frac{\Delta u}{t}=(1-\beta^{2})^{\frac{3}{2}}a_0\Big/\left[1+\beta^{2}(1+\sqrt{2})\right]\left[1+\frac{1}{2}\beta^{2}(1+\sqrt{2})\right]\Big|_{\beta=\frac{u}{c}}.\qquad(12\text{分}) $$

(3) 增设$u=\sqrt{\sqrt{2}-1}c$，得
$$ \beta^{2}=\sqrt{2}-1,\quad\beta^{2}(1+\sqrt{2})=1,\quad1-\beta^{2}=2-\sqrt{2}, $$
$$ \Rightarrow\quad\bar{a}=\frac{1}{3}(2-\sqrt{2})^{\frac{3}{2}}a_0=0.149a_0.\qquad(2\text{分}) $$

注解：据加速度变换公式
$$ a_x=(1-\beta^{2})^{3/2}a_x'\Big/\left(1+\frac{v}{c^{2}}u_x'\right)^{3}, $$
S系中P的初态加速度和末态加速度分别为
$$ a_i=\frac{(1-\beta^{2})^{\frac{3}{2}}}{(1+\beta^{2})^{3}}a_0=\frac{(2-\sqrt{2})^{\frac{3}{2}}}{(\sqrt{2})^{3}}a_0=0.159a_0, $$
$$ a_e=\frac{(1-\beta^{2})^{\frac{3}{2}}}{\left[1+\beta^{2}(1+\sqrt{2})\right]^{3}}a_0=\frac{(2-\sqrt{2})^{\frac{3}{2}}}{2^{3}}a_0=0.056a_0. $$
P在加速运动过程中，靠近初态的时段长，靠近末态的时段短，加速度平均值靠近初态加速度值。
problem_solution_en:
## Five. (20 points)

(1) In the S′ frame, P’s initial state is $\{x'=0,\;t'=0\}$, and P’s final state $\{x',t'\}$ is to be determined.
$$ \frac{1}{2}a_0 t'^{2}=x'=L+ut',\;\Rightarrow\;a_0 t'^{2}-2ut'-2L=0, $$
$$ \Rightarrow\;t'=\frac{1}{2a_0}\left(2u\pm\sqrt{4u^{2}+8a_0 L}\right)\Big|_{L=u^{2}/2a_0}=\frac{1}{2a_0}\left(2u\pm2\sqrt{2}u\right). $$
Taking the positive solution,
$$ t'=(1+\sqrt{2})u/a_0.\qquad(6\text{ points}) $$

(2) The final position and velocity of P in the S′ frame are
$$ x'=L+ut'=\frac{u^{2}}{2a_0}+\frac{(1+\sqrt{2})u^{2}}{a_0}=\frac{(1+\sqrt{2})^{2}}{2a_0}u^{2},\quad u_x'=a_0 t'=(1+\sqrt{2})u. $$
In the S frame, P’s initial state is $\{x_0=0,\;t_0=0\}$, and the time $t$ in P’s final state $\{x,\;t\}$ is to be determined.
$$ t=\frac{t'+\frac{v}{c^{2}}x'}{\sqrt{1-\beta^{2}}}\Bigg|_{\beta=\frac{v}{c}=\frac{u}{c}}=\frac{1}{\sqrt{1-\beta^{2}}}\frac{(1+\sqrt{2})u}{a_0}\left[1+\frac{u^{2}}{2c^{2}}(1+\sqrt{2})\right]\Bigg|_{\beta=\frac{u}{c}}, $$
P’s final velocity
$$ u_x=\frac{u_x'+v}{1+\frac{v}{c^{2}}u_x'}=\frac{(1+\sqrt{2})u+v}{1+\frac{v}{c^{2}}(1+\sqrt{2})u}. $$
Velocity increment over the whole process
$$ \Delta u=u_x-v=\frac{(1+\sqrt{2})u+v-v-\frac{v^{2}}{c^{2}}(1+\sqrt{2})u}{1+\frac{v}{c^{2}}(1+\sqrt{2})u}=\left(1-\frac{u^{2}}{c^{2}}\right)(1+\sqrt{2})u\Big/\left[1+\frac{u^{2}}{c^{2}}(1+\sqrt{2})\right]. $$
Average acceleration over the whole process
$$ \bar{a}=\frac{\Delta u}{\Delta t}=\frac{\Delta u}{t}=(1-\beta^{2})^{\frac{3}{2}}a_0\Big/\left[1+\beta^{2}(1+\sqrt{2})\right]\left[1+\frac{1}{2}\beta^{2}(1+\sqrt{2})\right]\Big|_{\beta=\frac{u}{c}}.\qquad(12\text{ points}) $$

(3) With the additional condition $u=\sqrt{\sqrt{2}-1}c$, we have
$$ \beta^{2}=\sqrt{2}-1,\quad\beta^{2}(1+\sqrt{2})=1,\quad1-\beta^{2}=2-\sqrt{2}, $$
$$ \Rightarrow\quad\bar{a}=\frac{1}{3}(2-\sqrt{2})^{\frac{3}{2}}a_0=0.149a_0.\qquad(2\text{ points}) $$

Note: According to the acceleration transformation formula
$$ a_x=(1-\beta^{2})^{3/2}a_x'\Big/\left(1+\frac{v}{c^{2}}u_x'\right)^{3}, $$
the initial and final accelerations of P in the S frame are respectively
$$ a_i=\frac{(1-\beta^{2})^{\frac{3}{2}}}{(1+\beta^{2})^{3}}a_0=\frac{(2-\sqrt{2})^{\frac{3}{2}}}{(\sqrt{2})^{3}}a_0=0.159a_0, $$
$$ a_e=\frac{(1-\beta^{2})^{\frac{3}{2}}}{\left[1+\beta^{2}(1+\sqrt{2})\right]^{3}}a_0=\frac{(2-\sqrt{2})^{\frac{3}{2}}}{2^{3}}a_0=0.056a_0. $$
During the acceleration process, the time near the initial state is long, and the time near the final state is short; hence the average acceleration is close to the initial acceleration.
img_cn: 图为一个关于惯性系S和S'相对运动的示意图。图中有两个坐标系，分别为S系和S'系。S'系相对于S系沿x轴正方向以速度v运动。初始时刻O和O'重合。在S'系中，质点Q从$x' = L$处以匀速u沿$x'$轴运动，质点P从$x' = 0$处由静止开始以加速度$a_0$沿$x'$轴运动，直至P和Q相碰。已知$L = u^2/2a_0$且$v = u$。

这是一道物理竞赛题的解题过程展示。上方是题号“五、(20 分)”，表明这是第五题，分值为20分。接着是题目内容，分三小问。第一问在S'系中分析P点初态和末态的关系，列出了关于时间$t'$的方程并求解得到$t'=(1 + \sqrt{2})u/a_0$。第二问分别在S'系和S系中确定P点的末态位置和速度，计算S系中P点末态的时间$t$、速度$u_x$、速度增量$\Delta u$和全过程平均加速度$\bar{a}$，并进行了详细推导。第三问先假设$u = \sqrt{2}-1c$，代入前面公式计算相关物理量的值，还给出了注释，介绍了加速度变换公式，并计算了S系中P点的初态加速度和末态加速度。
继续展示题目解题过程，呈现了更多公式计算和推导步骤。底部有页脚“2012年暑期物理竞赛辅导班联谊赛试题·85·”。
img_en: A schematic diagram showing the relative motion between inertial frames S and S'. There are two coordinate systems, S and S'. The S' frame moves along the positive x-axis with respect to the S frame at a velocity v. Initially, O and O' coincide. In the S' frame, particle Q moves along the $x'$-axis with a constant velocity u starting from $x' = L$, and particle P starts from rest at $x' = 0$ and moves along the $x'$-axis with a constant acceleration $a_0$ until P and Q collide. It is given that $L = u^2/2a_0$ and $v = u$.

This picture shows the solution process of a physics competition problem. At the top, there is the problem number "Five, (20 points)", indicating that this is the fifth question with a score of 20 points. Then comes the problem content, divided into three sub‑questions. In the first sub‑question, in the S' system, the relationship between the initial and final states of point P is analyzed, and an equation about time $t'$ is listed and solved to get $t'=(1 + \sqrt{2})u/a_0$. In the second sub‑question, the final state positions and velocities of point P are determined in both the S' and S systems, and the final time $t$, velocity $u_x$, velocity increment $\Delta u$, and the average acceleration $\bar{a}$ throughout the process are calculated with detailed derivations. In the third sub‑question, it is first assumed that $u = \sqrt{2}-1c$, and relevant physical quantities are calculated by substituting into the previous formulas. Annotations are also given, introducing the acceleration transformation formula and calculating the initial and final accelerations of point P in the S system.

Continues to show the problem‑solving process, presenting more formula calculations and derivation steps. The footer at the bottom reads "Problems for the Summer 2012 Physics Competition Tutorial Class Get‑together ·85·".
